repo_signals: L3 smoke for platform.ci-github: github actions workflow with matrix strategy, actions/checkout pinned to sha, github_token permissions, cache key, reusable workflow, and oidc cloud auth

validation_smoke.name: platform.ci-github L3 validation smoke
signals: GITHUB_TOKEN permissions block present and scoped to least privilege
third-party actions pinned to full commit SHA not floating tag
no secret referenced in a pull_request_target job that checks out PR head
cache key includes lockfile hash so it busts on dependency change

diagnosis_smoke.name: platform.ci-github diagnosis smoke
signals: pull_request_target checking out untrusted PR head with secrets in scope
third-party action referenced by mutable tag like @v3 or @main
GITHUB_TOKEN left at default write-all permissions
cache key not keyed on lockfile so stale dependencies persist
long-lived cloud credentials stored as secrets instead of OIDC
